location: On a corpse along a narrow cliff path northeast of the Windmill Village grace, in Dominula, Windmill Village.
tactics: From the Windmill Village Site of Grace, head north past the windmill and follow the narrow ledge along the cliff to the northeast.
The corpse sits at the end of that path; no enemy directly guards it, though Windmill Village's festival enemies patrol the surrounding area.
Don't confuse it with the other 'Celebrant' weapons (Sickle, Cleaver) that drop from Festival enemies elsewhere in Dominula — this one is a guaranteed, unguarded ground pickup.
lore: A heavy bludgeon decked out in flowers and layered fabric, used as a ceremonial dance prop during Dominula's windmill festivities. Its oversized skull head earns the wielder a trickle of runes with every solid hit.

builds.name: Early quality rune-farming hammer
builds.why: Low D-scaling Str/Dex requirements make it wieldable early, and its passive rune gain on hit rewards aggressive, hit-heavy play before you've found a better late-game Great Hammer.
